{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 5.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "你好，我是孙观楠开发的剪映草稿助手。"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 28], "size": 5.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "我擅长将音频、视频、图片素材拼接在一起剪辑输出剪映草稿。"}
